name: Starlit Bloom
overview: Gu Liusu, a meticulous jewelry brand founder and her unexpected one-night stand, Lu Xingchen, find themselves working together as boss and secretary. What begins as a comedic misunderstanding between opposites slowly transforms into a heartfelt romance, as professional respect deepens into emotional connection.
